creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
Possibly related: I see this consistently on a Lenovo ThinkPad X13s "Snapdragon" with 14.2R and 15.0-CURRENT. It hits error 19 followed by 'mountroot>'.

Unfortunately, while the keyboard is interactive during the loader stage, it is unavailable at the mountroot> prompt, making diagnostics difficult.

Any suggestions?
